name: Mage

abilities.name: Cinderbolt
abilities.desc: Hurls a fiery ball that causes $d Fire damage plus additional damage over time.

abilities.name: Hoarfrost Mantle
abilities.desc: Encases you in frost, increasing armor by $b for 30 min.

abilities.name: Aether Insight
abilities.desc: Increases the Intellect of all party members by $b% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Rimelance
abilities.desc: Launches a bolt of frost, causing $d Frost damage and slowing movement by 40%.

abilities.name: Waterbind
abilities.desc: Conjures 2 bottles of water, restoring mana when drunk. Higher ranks conjure purer water.

abilities.name: Flickerstep
abilities.desc: Teleports you 15 yd forward and breaks roots. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Cold Coffin
abilities.desc: Encases you in solid ice for 8 sec, becoming immune to all damage and effects and removing every harmful effect. Usable while stunned or polymorphed. You cannot act while encased. Recast to cancel. (Mage)

abilities.name: Ignition
abilities.desc: Passive: your spell critical strikes burn the target for 40% of the damage dealt over 6 sec, stacking. (Fire mastery)

abilities.name: Hot Streak
abilities.desc: Passive: two critical strikes in a row with your Fire spells (Cinderbolt, Cinderfall, Scald, Pyrelance or Flamestrike) make your next Pyrelance or Flamestrike instant and free. The spenders count toward the NEXT streak, free casts included; a Flamestrike counts once however many enemies it strikes, and only the initial impact ever counts. (Fire)

abilities.name: Blazing Barrier
abilities.desc: Wreathe yourself in flame, absorbing $d damage for 60 sec. (Fire)

abilities.name: Meteor
abilities.desc: Calls a meteor down on the target area: after a 2 sec fall it deals 90 to 120 Fire damage and Ignites everything it strikes. (Fire)

abilities.name: Phoenix Trance
abilities.desc: Combust: for 10 sec your Fire spells always critically strike, including bolts already in flight. Off the global cooldown. These crits build Hot Streak like any other. (Fire signature)

abilities.name: Summon Water Elemental
abilities.desc: Summon a Water Elemental to fight beside you, hurling Waterbolts at your target and channeling Water Jet. (Frost)

abilities.name: Ice Lance
abilities.desc: Hurl a shard of ice, dealing $d Frost damage, tripled against a frozen target. Spends Fingers of Frost, or a charge of Winter's Chill, to treat the target as frozen. (Frost)

abilities.name: Fingers of Frost
abilities.desc: Rimelance has a 15% chance to grant Fingers of Frost, up to 2 charges: your next Ice Lance treats its target as frozen. (Frost)

abilities.name: Brain Freeze
abilities.desc: Rimelance has a 20% chance to make your next Winterlash instant and free of its cooldown. (Frost)

abilities.name: Brittle Ruin
abilities.desc: Your spells gain 50% critical strike chance against frozen targets. Fingers of Frost and Winter's Chill count as frozen. (Frost)

abilities.name: Breadbind
abilities.desc: Conjures 2 servings of bread, restoring health when eaten. Higher ranks conjure heartier fare.

abilities.name: Spellbreak
abilities.desc: Counters enemy spellcasting, preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 6 sec. (Mage talent)

abilities.name: Cinderfall
abilities.desc: Blasts the enemy for $d Fire damage. Instant.

abilities.name: Aether Darts
abilities.desc: Launches Aether Darts at the enemy, causing $d Arcane damage each second for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Winterlash
abilities.desc: Loose three icy bolts for $d Frost damage each and plant Winter's Chill on the target: its next 2 incoming compatible spells treat it as frozen. Brain Freeze makes Winterlash instant and skips its cooldown. (Frost)

abilities.name: Bewitch
abilities.desc: Transforms the enemy into a toad for up to $t sec. The toad wanders and heals rapidly. Any damage breaks the effect. Beasts and humanoids only.

abilities.name: Icebind
abilities.desc: Freezes all nearby enemies in place for up to 8 sec, dealing $d Frost damage. The root breaks after cumulative damage equal to 15% of the target's maximum health, with a minimum of 20 and a maximum of 60 damage.

abilities.name: Frozen Orb
abilities.desc: Release an orb of swirling frost that drifts forward for 8 sec, dealing $d Frost damage each second to nearby enemies and slowing them by 30%. Each striking pulse generates one Icicle. (Frost)

abilities.name: Blizzard
abilities.desc: Conjures an ice storm at the target area: after a 2 sec cast it rages for 6 sec, dealing 12 to 16 Frost damage each second and slowing enemies by 40%. Each enemy struck shaves 0.5 sec off Frozen Orb, up to 3 sec per cast. (Frost)

abilities.name: Icy Veins
abilities.desc: Increases spell haste by 30% and prevents cast interruption and pushback for 10 sec. (Frost signature)

abilities.name: Glacial Spike
abilities.desc: Conjure a massive spike of ice, consuming 5 Icicles to deal $d Frost damage and freeze the target in place for 4 sec. (Frost)

abilities.name: Glacial Front
abilities.desc: Hold to gather a widening front of frost, then release it in a cone. Longer charges reach farther and deal more damage. All enemies hit are slowed by 50% for 4 sec; maximum charge also roots them for 1 sec. (Frost)

abilities.name: Dragon's Breath
abilities.desc: Hold to gather a widening breath of flame, then release it in a cone. Longer charges reach farther and deal more damage. Enemies hit are disoriented and damage breaks the effect; maximum charge always critically strikes and counts once toward Hot Streak. (Fire)

abilities.name: Aetherburst
abilities.desc: A burst of Arcane energy hits all nearby enemies for $d Arcane damage.

abilities.name: Scald
abilities.desc: Scalds the enemy for $d Fire damage and quickens you by 20% for 3 sec. Quick to cast, and castable while moving.

abilities.name: Frostveil
abilities.desc: Shields you in ice, absorbing $d damage for 60 sec.

abilities.name: Pyrelance
abilities.desc: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that causes $d Fire damage plus additional damage over time.

abilities.name: Flamestrike
abilities.desc: Calls down a burst of flame at the target area, dealing $d Fire damage to enemies caught in the blast. Can critically strike (one strike for the whole blast).

abilities.name: Temporal Barrier
abilities.desc: Shifts the target a heartbeat out of the present, a temporal shell absorbing $d damage for 10 sec before the timeline snaps back.

abilities.name: Temporal Echo
abilities.desc: Marks an ally with an echo of a healthier moment, mending $d health at once. For $t sec, part of the Arcane damage you deal is drawn back through the echo to heal them.

abilities.name: Aether Surge
abilities.desc: Draws a surge of raw aether through the enemy for $d damage. Each cast leaves an Arcane Charge that raises your next Aether Surge's damage and cast speed (5% faster each) but sharply raises its mana cost, stacking up to 4; Aether Darts spends the charges. Each cast can also arm Aether Rush, making your next Aether Surge free and twice as fast to cast.

abilities.name: Temporal Cascade
abilities.desc: Sends an echo cascading through your group: the target and up to four of their nearest allies are mended at once and each marked for $t sec, drawing part of the Arcane damage you deal back through their echoes to heal them. (Chronomancy)

abilities.name: Temporal Reversal
abilities.desc: Rewinds a fallen ally's timeline, returning them to life at their body with a portion of their health and mana, even in the thick of combat. (Chronomancy)

abilities.name: Collective Reversal
abilities.desc: Rewinds every fallen member of your group or raid, returning them to life at their body with 30% health and mana. Cannot be cast in combat. (Chronomancy)

abilities.name: Rewind
abilities.desc: Sends an arcane wave through your group or raid, rewinding time to restore 30% of the damage each ally within 40 yards took over the last 5 seconds (up to 35% of their maximum health). Cannot be a critical effect. (Chronomancy)

abilities.name: Hourglass of Suspension
abilities.desc: Place a temporal hourglass at the selected location. Beneath an enemy, it suspends them for $e sec in PvE or $p sec in PvP and prevents all actions; damage breaks the effect. At your feet or beneath a group ally, it grants stasis for $t sec, prevents damage and actions, restores $h% of maximum health, and makes cooldowns recover $s% faster for you or $a% faster for an ally. On empty ground, the hourglass waits for $g sec and affects the first valid unit to step on it. The beneficial aura can be removed manually.

abilities.name: Temporal Acceleration
abilities.desc: Accelerates the flow of time for your group or raid, increasing attack, casting, and channeling speed by 30% for 15 sec. Allies recently affected by Temporal Acceleration or Storm Chorus are too exhausted to benefit. (Chronomancy)

abilities.name: Perfect Moment
abilities.desc: Seize your perfect moment: instantly gain 4 Arcane Charges, and for 10 sec Aether Darts does not consume them. (Chronomancer)

abilities.name: Ember Form
abilities.desc: Transform into a blazing ember, increasing movement speed by $b%. You cannot attack or cast spells while transformed. Recast to return to your normal form.

playbook: You are playing a Mage (mana-based, ranged).
Goal: gain XP safely — kill mobs at or below your level, complete quests, stay alive.
SURVIVE: if HP < 25% and a mob is hitting you, flee or use a defensive; if safe and HP < 60%, eat/consume.
RESOURCE: if mana < 20% and out of combat, drink before pulling.
ENGAGE: pick the nearest hostile within range of your goal, close to ability range (face it), then attack.
ROTATE: cast the first ready ability in "rotation" each GCD (respect cost/cooldown/range/line-of-sight); auto-attack fills the gaps.
LOOT/QUEST: after a kill, loot the corpse; interact with quest objects/NPCs the objective needs.
Avoid pulling Elite/Rare mobs above your level, and don't pull more than you can handle.
